title: An Act authorizing the commissioner of capital asset management and maintenance to grant an easement over certain land in the town of Sturbridge

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Fattman and Mr. Smola of Warren, a joint petition (accompanied by bill) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Ryan C. Fattman and Todd M. Smola for legislation to authorize the commissioner of capital asset management and maintenance to grant an easement over certain land in the town of Sturbridge.  State Administration and Regulatory Oversight.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Referred to the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight

related_entities.name: committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
